concat(
  '<div style="background:#1e1e1e;height:100%;box-sizing:border-box;display:flex;flex-direction:column;overflow:hidden">',
  '<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;padding:6px 12px;background:#252526;border-bottom:1px solid #3d3d3d;flex-shrink:0">',
  '<span style="color:#7ec8e3;font-weight:bold;font-size:13px">&#9889; Monaco Editor &#8212; cookbook/Monaco_Demo</span>',
  '<label style="color:#9a9a9a;font-size:12px;margin-left:auto">Language:&#160;<select id="monaco-lang-select" style="background:#3c3c3c;color:#ccc;border:1px solid #555;border-radius:3px;padding:2px 8px;font-size:12px;cursor:pointer"><option value="sql">SQL</option><option value="json">JSON</option><option value="python">Python</option><option value="jinja2">Jinja2</option><option value="plaintext">Plain Text</option></select></label>',
  '<label style="color:#9a9a9a;font-size:12px;margin-left:8px">Theme:&#160;<select id="monaco-theme-select" style="background:#3c3c3c;color:#ccc;border:1px solid #555;border-radius:3px;padding:2px 8px;font-size:12px;cursor:pointer"><option value="vs-dark">Dark</option><option value="vs">Light</option><option value="hc-black">High Contrast</option></select></label>',
  '</div>',
  '<div id="monaco-container" style="flex:1;overflow:hidden"><div style="color:#9a9a9a;padding:16px;font-family:monospace;font-size:12px">&#8987; Loading Monaco from CDN...</div></div>',
  '<img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAAAAACH5BAEKAAEALAAAAAABAAEAAAICTAEAOw==" style="display:none" onload="eval(atob(\'\'))">',
  '</div>'
)
